query: SELECT id, leadName, leadPhone, stage, bedrooms, bathrooms, quotedPrice, selectedSlot, address, createdAt, updatedAt FROM conversation_sessions WHERE leadPhone LIKE '%2404709353%' OR leadPhone LIKE '%240-470-9353%' OR leadPhone LIKE '%+12404709353%' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
